mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the unemployment rate above 5.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate profit visibility and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or 20d return volatility in high UNRATE regimes falls below 15%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in industrial production and housing starts signal weak supply chain resilience and reduced corporate capital expenditure, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for the interaction term drops below 0.05 over any 3-year window, or 60d returns in contraction regimes exceed 10%.

mechanism_narrative: A 6-month decline in real sales (RSAFS) combined with slowing GDP growth (GDPC1) indicates weakening consumer demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns during late-cycle expansion regimes.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in late-cycle regimes exceed 8% despite negative signal, or the interaction term's t-statistic falls below 1.96.

mechanism_narrative: Positive month-over-month job gains (PAYEMS) above 100k signal improving labor market health, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through increased consumer spending.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in high PAYEMS regimes fall below 0.5% or Rank IC drops below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in housing starts (HOUST) below 900k signals reduced construction activity and weak demand for durable goods, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in low HOUST regimes exceed 5% or the signal's t-statistic falls below 1.64.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in inflation (CPIAUCSL) and federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) indicate monetary tightening, reducing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for the interaction term drops below 0.05 or 60d returns in tightening regimes exceed 12%.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) below 100 signals manufacturing contraction, reducing corporate earnings and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in low INDPRO regimes exceed 2% or the signal's t-statistic falls below 1.96.
